creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
if you’ve recently stayed at the Thistle London Piccadilly and need your receipts from the Bicester Village Outlet, let me know 👍

I like to test out new hotels in London so I can keep my travel guides and blog posts up to date. I probably won’t include the Thistle London Piccadilly in my guides on where to stay in London though 😅

What’s the weirdest thing you’ve found at a hotel room? 🫣

#londonlife #travellife

transcription.text: I just moved this chair. I don't really know what the chair is for, but... And I just found these receipts from previous guests and... Is it a bit weird that I now know their names and that they went to Oxford?
